case_title: ADVANTAGE ASSETS II INC. VS. MITCHELL E CARSON et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: REDUCED FILING FEE AND RE: VENUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF ADVANTAGE ASSETS II INC.
MINI-MINUTES FOR DEC-27-2010 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION 301, NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT MITCHELL CARSON'S MOTION TO DISMISS WITH PREJUDICE IS CONTINUED TO 1/5/2011 FOR MOVING PARTY TO PROVIDE THE COURT WITH ENDORSED FILED COURTESY COPIES OF MOVING PAPERS IN CONFORMITY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6(B) NO LATER THAN 12/30/2010. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: JOANNE FARRELL, CSR # 4838 (301/PJB)

LAW AND MOTION 301, NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT MITCHELL CARSON'S MOTION TO DISMISS WITH PREJUDICE IS DENIED. IT IS NOT A MOTION PROVIDED FOR BY THE CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE, IT DOES NOT CONFORM TO CA RULE OF COURT 3.1112, IT RELIES ON STATEMENTS NOT ALLEGED IN THE COMPLAINT, DEFENDANT HAS ALREADY FILED AN ANSWER AND NO COURTESY COPIES OF ANY PROOF OF SERVICE HAS BEEN PROVIDED IN RESPONSE TO THE COURT DECEMBER 27 DIRECTION. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189 301/PJB
MINI-MINUTES FOR JAN-05-2011 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301

REMOVED FROM MASTER COURT CALENDAR SET FOR JAN-24-2011. ELIZABETH MCDONALD APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF AND SELF-REPRESENTED DEFENDANT MITCHELL E. CARSON ALSO PRESENT IN COURT. THE COURT ORDERED THE CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AT THE REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF. JUDGE: KATHERINE FEINSTEIN; CLERK: E. BURA; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ADVANTAGE ASSETS II INC. SERVED MAY-10-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CARSON, MITCHELL E
NOTICE OF AND MOTION TO DISMISS WITH PREJUDICE, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES FILED BY DEFENDANT CARSON, MITCHELL E HEARING SET FOR DEC-27-2010 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301

REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, PLACED IN PICKUP BOX, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF ADVANTAGE ASSETS II INC. AS TO DEFENDANT CARSON, MITCHELL E
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR OCT-01-2010 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ADVANTAGE ASSETS II INC. AS TO DEFENDANT CARSON, MITCHELL E DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-25-2010

NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL, COURT TRIAL SET FOR JAN-24-2011 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 206. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE ON OCT-01-2010 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
